[@Public](<../../../annotation/Public.html> "annotation interface in org.apache.flink.annotation") public interface ResultTypeQueryable<T>

This interface can be implemented by functions and input formats to tell the framework about their produced data type. This method acts as an alternative to the reflection analysis that is otherwise performed and is useful in situations where the produced data type may vary depending on parametrization.

  * ## Method Summary

Modifier and Type

Method

Description

`[TypeInformation](<../../common/typeinfo/TypeInformation.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.common.typeinfo")<[T](<ResultTypeQueryable.html> "type parameter in ResultTypeQueryable")>`

`getProducedType()`

Gets the data type (as a [`TypeInformation`](<../../common/typeinfo/TypeInformation.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.common.typeinfo")) produced by this function or input format.

  * ## Method Details

    * ### getProducedType

[TypeInformation](<../../common/typeinfo/TypeInformation.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.common.typeinfo")<[T](<ResultTypeQueryable.html> "type parameter in ResultTypeQueryable")> getProducedType()

Gets the data type (as a [`TypeInformation`](<../../common/typeinfo/TypeInformation.html> "class in org.apache.flink.api.common.typeinfo")) produced by this function or input format.

Returns:
    The data type produced by this function or input format.
